zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Stanley於1405年10月23日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可諾福斯利時，他的父親John Stanley20歲，母親Elizabeth Isabel Harrington20歲。他於1427年與Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1441年被列為lord chamberlain of north wales。他去世於1459年2月11日在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Stanley于1405年10月23日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾可諾福斯利时，他的父亲John Stanley20岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabel Harrington20岁。他于1427年与Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1441年被列为lord chamberlain of north wales。他去世于1459年2月11日在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Stanley was born on 23 October 1405, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Stanley, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, was 20. He married Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley in 1427, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. In 1441, his occupation is listed as lord chamberlain of north wales. He died on 11 February 1459, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Burscough, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Stanley est né le 23 octobre 1405, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stanley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley en 1427, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. En 1441, sa profession de son indiquée est lord chamberlain of north wales. Il est décédé le 11 février 1459, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Burscough, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Stanley am 23. Oktober 1405 in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stanley 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Isabel Harrington 20. Er hat 1427 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1441 ist sein Beruf als lord chamberlain of north wales aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Februar 1459 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Knowsley, Lancashire, England und wurde in Burscough, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stanley è nato il il 23 ottobre 1405 nel Knowsley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Stanley, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley nel 1427, nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1441, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord chamberlain of north wales. Morì il 11 febbraio 1459, nel Knowsley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Burscough, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stanleyが1405年10月23日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで生まれた時，父John Stanleyは20歳，母Elizabeth Isabel Harringtonは20歳であった。1427年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムでLady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1441年，職業はlord chamberlain of north walesと記録されている。彼は1459年2月11日にイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブルスコウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Stanley(이)가 1405년 10월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stanley(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabel Harrington(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1427년 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1441년, 그의 직업은 lord chamberlain of north wales이었다. 그는 1459년 2월 11일 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 버스코우그h에 묻혔다.

pt.23 OCT 1405–11 February 1459: 23 de outubro de 1405–11 de fevereiro de 1459
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stanley nasceu em 23 de outubro de 1405, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Stanley, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley em 1427, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1441, sua profissão aparece como lord chamberlain of north wales. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1459, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Stanley родился 23 октября 1405 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Stanley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley в 1427 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1441 году он работал по профессии lord chamberlain of north wales. Он умер 11 февраля 1459 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности бурскоую, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1437 to 1443: mai le 1437 e o'o I le 1443

es.23 OCT 1405–11 February 1459: 23 de octubre de 1405–11 de febrero de 1459
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Stanley nació el 23 de octubre de 1405, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Stanley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isabel Harrington, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley en 1427, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1441, su ocupación registrada era lord chamberlain of north wales. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1459, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
